customer_name.evidence: Agent: Good afternoon, Saurabh baat kar raha tha HDFC Life ke abhi half se. ... Customer: Haanji, bataiye Saurabh.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Aap mereko na iska jo brochure vagera hai, WhatsApp kar dijiye. Main dekh leta hun, phir hum Monday baat karte hai, theek hai sir?

objections.quote: Mere paas Sanchay plan ki pehle bhi kal mail aa chuki hai. Usme saare aapka ye laga hua hai. Main ek baar match kar leta hun usse.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Mere paas Sanchay plan ki pehle bhi kal mail aa chuki hai. Usme saare aapka ye laga hua hai. Main ek baar match kar leta hun usse.

primary_goal.evidence: Agent: ...kaafi acche saving bata rahe the aapko.

agent_promises: 35 percent ki advance income ka benefit provide kara ke chalti hai aapko whole life tak

approachability.reasoning: Customer is familiar with the product and requested a brochure, but is currently hesitant to engage in a verbal pitch.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced HDFC Life and a new plan, and the customer responded positively to hear more.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was engaged and provided necessary details but eventually pushed back to review the brochure independently.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer requested a brochure and deferred further discussion to Monday, mentioning he already has information on the plan.
call_narrative.ending: The customer insisted on reviewing the brochure he already had and ended the conversation after the agent tried to continue the pitch.

key_quotes: Mere paas Sanchay plan ki pehle bhi kal mail aa chuki hai. Usme saare aapka ye laga hua hai. Main ek baar match kar leta hun usse.
Aap mereko na iska jo brochure vagera hai, WhatsApp kar dijiye. Main dekh leta hun, phir hum Monday baat karte hai, theek hai sir?
